_Darwin watches a Health and Safety video and gets carried away. When Mr Small shows a health and safety video in class, Darwin becomes obsessed with the idea of keeping the Wattersons safe. He tries to protect them from the world around them and soon Darwin's over-protective control-freakery spreads to every corner of Elmore. The Wattersons have no choice but to overthrow his despotic regime._

_Gumball and Darwin are running late for school but need to arrive in time to avoid expulsion. Gumball and Darwin hit snooze too many times on their alarm clock and miss the school-bus. Miss Simian has threatened to expel them if they don't get to school on time. A mysterious clock appears showing exactly how long they have to get to school. When it looks like they aren't going to make it in time, they stop the clock which effects the space/time continuum._

_Can Gumball and Darwin get through a whole week without somebody ruining the movie they're planning to see? Gumball and Darwin have spent all their pocket money, so will have to wait until the following weekend to see "The Screamening." It"s the scariest film of the year. The only problem is everyone else has seen it, and won't stop talking about it. Gumball is determined to avoid all spoilers. Will he succeed?_

Things aren't going Gumball's way at school so he assumes there must be a Secret Society that gives preferential treatment to its own members. ### 2032371
**Gumball S03E27 - The Butterfly**  
🆕 TV-Y7-FV 🔓 11:27  
⌛ July 20, 2026 at 23:59:00 EDT  
[Open in app](https://cnvideo.sercomkc.org/redirector.html?type=cnapp&seriesid=10000000000&titleid=2032371&mediaid=4b1a054e9d870c299cd205606364ba296cb0b4fa) or on the web: https://www.cartoonnetwork.com/video/gumball/the-butterfly-episode.html  
seriesid=`835928` titleid=`2032371` mediaid=`4b1a054e9d870c299cd205606364ba296cb0b4fa`  
_Gumball learns the true meaning of the butterfly effect. In Biology class, Gumball and Darwin are waiting for a butterfly to emerge from its chrysalis. Miss Simian warns them about the Butterfly Effect whereby the flap of an insect's wings can start a tornado on the other side of the world. Paying no heed, Gumball releases the emergent butterfly into the wild, where it causes havoc upon Elmore._  
<a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2032371_001_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2032371_001_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2032371_002_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2032371_002_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2032371_003_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2032371_003_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2032371_004_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2032371_004_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2032371_005_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2032371_005_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2032371_006_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2032371_006_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2032371_007_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2032371_007_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2032371_008_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2032371_008_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2032371_009_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2032371_009_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2032371_010_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2032371_010_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a>
### 2034047
**Gumball S03E54 - The Saint**  
🆕 TV-Y7-FV 🔓 11:26  
⌛ July 20, 2026 at 23:59:00 EDT  
[Open in app](https://cnvideo.sercomkc.org/redirector.html?type=cnapp&seriesid=10000000000&titleid=2034047&mediaid=522914d5e3cb98dc1a41429235f9d474d86a19ce) or on the web: https://www.cartoonnetwork.com/video/gumball/the-saint-episode.html  
seriesid=`835928` titleid=`2034047` mediaid=`522914d5e3cb98dc1a41429235f9d474d86a19ce`  
_Gumball doesn't believe anyone could really be as nice as Alan and sets out to find his breaking point. Alan is so good-natured that Gumball feels compelled to make him lose his temper. Despite turning the whole school against him, destroying his relationship with Carmen and even selling his parents, Alan remains understanding and happy. Defeated, Gumball and Darwin decide to adopt Alan's positive attitude to see if they can be more like Alan.Gumball and Darwin help Anais make up an imaginary friend who turns out to be all too real. Anais throws a party but no-one shows up as she has no friends or social skills. Gumball and Darwin help Anais make up an imaginary friend who, much to all their surprise, appears in front of them. Gumball and Darwin teach Anais and her new friend how to become friends but realize he might not be so imaginary after all._

_Gumball and Darwin seek the answer to the biggest question of all: what is the meaning of life? They need to understand the point of their lives, so resolve to seek advice from everyone in Elmore. They ask people, animals and even planets but their answer comes from an unexpected source._  
<a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2032372_001_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2032372_001_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2032372_002_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2032372_002_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2032372_003_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2032372_003_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2032372_004_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2032372_004_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2032372_005_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2032372_005_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2032372_006_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2032372_006_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2032372_007_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2032372_007_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2032372_008_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2032372_008_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2032372_009_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2032372_009_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2032372_010_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2032372_010_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a>

_Gumball inadvertently cracks open Penny's shell and discovers who she really is inside . . . While performing a school play, Gumball is so nervous about kissing Penny that he accidentally headbutts her and cracks open her shell. They discover that under Penny's shell is an emotional shape-shifting inner self. Penny's father is determined for Penny to keep it hidden but Gumball encourages her to show the world who, or what, she really is . . ._

TV-Y7-FV 🔒 11:26  
⌛ July 20, 2026 at 23:59:00 EDT

_Gumball and Darwin go to extraordinary lengths to avoid taking out the trash. Gumball and Darwin are offended when Mom calls them "procrastinators", once she's told them what it means. They promise to take the trash out by the time she gets home. As the clock slowly counts down, they discover that they will go to extraordinary lengths, no matter how inane, to avoid the task in hand._  
<a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2020176_001_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2020176_001_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2020176_002_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2020176_002_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2020176_003_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2020176_003_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2020176_004_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2020176_004_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2020176_005_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2020176_005_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2020176_006_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2020176_006_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2020176_007_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2020176_007_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2020176_008_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2020176_008_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2020176_009_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2020176_009_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2020176_010_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2020176_010_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a>

_Gumball and Darwin are given the job of looking after the lame school hamster. Principal Brown gives Gumball and Darwin the ancient school hamster, Chris Morris, to look after for the weekend. However they accidentally leave it at school, and take home a clump of Principal Brown's hair instead. Surprisingly they discover it makes an excellent pet!  When they realize they have left the real Chris Morris at school, they have to race to find him before their error is discovered._  
<a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2028426_001_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2028426_001_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2028426_002_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2028426_002_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2028426_003_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2028426_003_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2028426_004_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2028426_004_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2028426_005_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2028426_005_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2028426_006_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2028426_006_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2028426_007_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2028426_007_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2028426_008_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2028426_008_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2028426_009_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2028426_009_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2028426_010_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2028426_010_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a>

_It's Mother's Day and kids put their moms through a series of tests to determine who has the World's Greatest Mom.  It's Mother's Day, and Gumball and Darwin discover that Tobias and Banana Joe have both made a card for "The Best Mom in the World". Clearly Nicole Watterson is the Best Mom, but Tobias and BJ just won't admit it... So they organise a mom-off at the mall between Nicole, Banana Barbara and Jackie Wilson. Needless to say it gets pretty intense._

### 2020175
**Gumball S03E18 - The Password**  
TV-Y7-FV 🔒 11:26  
⌛ July 20, 2026 at 23:59:00 EDT

seriesid=`835928` titleid=`2020175` mediaid=`d5091b9e09ed73a7671ea004c11f1aaea37736a6`  
_Gumball and Darwin are shocked to discover that Anais is Dad's favourite child. Mom has forced Dad to install a password on the computer. The pop-up clue advises them that the password is the name of Dad's favorite child. After trying "Gumball" and "Darwin" unsuccessfully, they discover the answer is, in fact, "Anais". They are determined to become Dad's favorites by any means necessary, even if it means undermining each other, plotting against Anais or driving a wedge between mom and dad . . ._  
<a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2020175_001_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2020175_001_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2020175_002_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2020175_002_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2020175_003_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2020175_003_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2020175_004_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2020175_004_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2020175_005_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2020175_005_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2020175_006_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2020175_006_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2020175_007_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2020175_007_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2020175_008_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2020175_008_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2020175_009_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2020175_009_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2020175_010_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2020175_010_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a>
